title: U.S.-Saudi Nuclear Deal Stokes Israeli Concerns of Mideast Arms Race
summary_full: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the agreement, while critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.
summary_public: An Israeli minister sought to downplay the agreement, while critics said it could spur other regional countries to pursue a nuclear program, and potentially the creation of a bomb.

IL.evidence: Israeli Concerns of Mideast Arms Race
